$comment: Single source of truth for what belongs to the enterprise edition at the database layer. Consumed by scripts/generate-open-types.mjs and scripts/dump-open-schema.sh. Keep this in sync whenever you add an EE-only table, function, or column. NOTE: token metering (project_billing / consume_case_tokens) and letter sharing (letter_tokens / letter_events / letter_public_sign_pdf) are OPEN features used by the core agent loop and letters module, so they intentionally ship in the open build. Only monetization/growth surfaces (Stripe billing, referrals, payouts, lawyer intros, lifecycle email, demo reset, public-letter signing endpoints) are stripped here.

columns.$comment: Columns living on OSS tables that leak EE concepts. Stripped from generated types; keep DB column but the OSS build must not read them.
